posts.community: Amanta Healthcare Ltd : India's Only Two-Port IV Fluid Manufacturer
posts.text: image 1124×1064 191 KB Screenshot 2026-05-19 at 9.11.56 PM 2054×616 133 KB FY26 earnings look in line with expectations, as the revenue growth was minimal with similar margins. However, PAT growing at more than 40% absolutely shows the deleveraging playing out in the business. The capex-benefitted earnings are yet to hit the P&L. Yet to analyse the concall in detail once the transcript is in hand, to see what management has to say about the capex timelines and the RM cost outlook for Q1FY27.
